channel.title: SevenAtSevenPolitics
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SevenAtSevenPolitics, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: California voter ID initiative clears signature threshold, setting up November showdown with Newsom
item.description: A petition to require voter I.D. and allow only U.S. citizens to vote has blown well past the required 875,000-signature threshold to be added to the ...

item.title: Father of girl injured by illegal migrant truck driver slams ‘insensitive’ rhetoric during Noem hearing
item.description: The father of girl injured by alleged illegal immigrant truck driver urges lawmakers to prioritize American safety during emotional House Judiciary he...

item.title: Dem Senate hopeful holds event at bookstore selling 'ABOLISH ICE' merch despite pledge to 'secure the border'
item.description: Dem Senate hopeful Zach Wahls told voters he believes in 'old Democratic values' and wants to 'secure the border,' but campaigned Saturday at a bookst...

item.title: “Technology is our superpower”—Africa and India take seat at top table as AI revolution spreads
item.description: Emerging economies like Nigeria and India are leapfrogging into a tech-driven future, where mobile networks and AI could redefine development—and resh...

item.title: The Week: Trump Goes to War
item.description: Plus: Goodbye, Kristi Noem.

item.title: Noem Out
item.description: The former South Dakota governor was never well-suited to the job.

item.title: Applying Iraq’s Hardest Lessons to Iran
item.description: While Iran is not Iraq 2.0, it requires a disciplined approach and a clear plan for the future.

item.title: House GOP leaders ask Gonzales to drop reelection bid after confession of affair with staffer
item.description: House Republican leaders are asking Rep. Tony Gonzales to end his reelection campaign after the Texas Republican confessed to having an affair with an...

item.title: A Temporary Respite for Free Speech in Britain
item.description: Amid political tumult in the U.K., Hamit Coskun’s victory is likely to be an exception rather than the rule.

item.title: $3.7 billion whisper: the explosive growth of quiet corporate activism
item.description: Sometimes, silence speaks volumes. There's a quiet revolution taking place in corporate purpose.

item.title: Kristi Noem Rides off into the Sunset
item.description: The ousted DHS secretary took a serious role and made it like something out of Veep .

item.title: Spanberger refuses to honor ICE detainer in murder case, escalating showdown with Trump DHS
item.description: Virginia Gov. Spanberger faces GOP criticism for demanding federal warrant before releasing alleged murderer to ICE, sparking sanctuary state debate.

item.title: We’re economists who designed a chatbot to help our students reason instead of cheat. Meet ‘Macro Buddy’
item.description: About 90% of 1,100 U.S. students surveyed at two-year and four-year colleges in 2025 reported using generative AI.

item.title: The President is surprised by the lack of European support for military action against Iran—he shouldn’t be
item.description: With Iraq’s legacy still lingering and a changing America in view, Europe is no longer willing to fall in line behind Washington’s wars—even when alli...

item.title: Dem lawmaker's illegal alien SOTU guest part of records dispute involving police reports: report
item.description: Rep. Seth Moulton's State of the Union guest reportedly referenced in sealed police reports that Massachusetts authorities have declined to release.

item.title: Senate passes bill to expand protections of minors' online data
item.description: The Senate on Thursday passed a bill to expand a 1998 law that restricts the online collection, use, and disclosure of personal information of childre...

item.title: The last 3 years were the hottest ever recorded. Here’s why we may look back at them as some of the coolest we remember
item.description: By most indicators, the planet should have been cooler in 2025 than it was.

item.title: Trump Despises RINOs. So Why Is He Reportedly About To Endorse One Of The Swamp’s Biggest?
item.description: Endorsing John Cornyn, the Senate’s leading RINO, would be disloyal to Texas’ loyal conservative base — and to himself.

item.title: 17 Times James Talarico Made Us Wonder If He Was Created In A Lab
item.description: From arguing 'God is nonbinary' to 'grieving' over protecting the unborn, it's clear Talarico is a leftist lab experiment gone wrong.

item.title: Senate Democrats again block Homeland Security funding, ignore GOP warnings of Iran war needs
item.description: Senate Democrats Thursday blocked a Department of Homeland Security funding bill for the third time, despite their Republican colleagues' concern that...

item.title: U.S. and Venezuela agree to reestablish diplomatic relations in historical shift
item.description: The United States and Venezuela agreed to reestablish diplomatic relations in a major shift in a historically adversarial relationship, the State Depa...

item.title: Thune And GOP Establishment Fight Harder For Worthless Cornyn Than SAVE Act
item.description: The establishment GOP will stop at nothing to keep its power to do nothing.

item.title: Hegseth Partners With 17 Countries To Fight Narcoterrorists In Western Hemisphere
item.description: The Americas Counter Cartel Conference Joint Security Declaration aims to 'expand multilateral and bilateral cooperation' in the hemisphere to combat ...

item.title: Paxton Is Doing More To Pass The SAVE Act Than Cornyn, And He’s Not Even In Congress Yet
item.description: Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton said he would consider dropping his senatorial bid if Congress would lift the filibuster in order to pass the SAVE A...

item.title: Justice Department publishes missing Epstein files involving uncorroborated claim about Trump
item.description: The Justice Department on Thursday released additional Jeffrey Epstein files involving uncorroborated accusations made by a woman against President Do...

item.title: The Question That Exposes Weak Quant Models
item.description: Errant variables can quietly undermine even the most statistically impressive quant models. The post The Question That Exposes Weak Quant Models appea...

item.title: International Women’s Day: Women Leaders Put Nutrition First
item.description: Women are three times more likely than men to invest in eating well. The post International Women’s Day: Women Leaders Put Nutrition First appeared fi...

item.title: NLP and Yield Curve Prediction From Central Bank Minutes
item.description: Can algorithms that analyze central bank language help predict the next move in the yield curve? The post NLP and Yield Curve Prediction From Central ...

item.title: Three Levers That Drive VC Returns
item.description: VC performance hinges on ownership and failure reduction, not just rare breakout wins. The post Three Levers That Drive VC Returns appeared first on C...

item.title: Geopolitical Risk and Portfolio Oversight
item.description: A framework for identifying material geopolitical shocks, translating them into portfolio impacts, and documenting risk for oversight and governance. ...
